projects.title: Dynamic Material Systems
projects.desc: A system of dynamic materials built using Material Parameter Collections and Blueprints to animate and control UI visuals in real time. Designed for flexibility across multiple projects with minimal overhead.
projects.workflow: Started by identifying common UI material patterns across the project. Built a master parameter collection to drive colour, opacity, and animation globally. Created individual material functions for each effect type, then wired them into a single master material with switch parameters for artists to toggle features without touching nodes.

projects.title: UI Shader Toolkit
projects.desc: A collection of stylized and animated UI material functions built for diegetic and screen-space UI elements.
projects.workflow: Describe your workflow here — what problem did you solve, how did you approach it, what tools did you use, what did you learn?

projects.title: Construction Viz Materials
projects.desc: Physically based materials and shaders for real-time architectural visualization.

projects.title: Procedural Function Library
projects.desc: A reusable library of procedural material functions enabling stylized and dynamic material creation across multiple projects.

projects.title: Master Material System
projects.desc: A master material architecture built to maintain visual consistency and reduce redundant shader variations.

projects.title: Material Transition System
projects.desc: An animated material system to visualize progressive building assembly and material transitions over time.
